title: RSW Pack of 10 Assorted Christmas Cards - 2 Designs Santa and Rudolph - Red Foil Finish - Christmas Cards for Children - Eco Friendly Packaging 100% Recyclable
features: Charming Designs: Includes two delightful Santa and Rudolph designs, perfect for spreading holiday joy to children and families.
Festive Red Foil Finish: Each card is adorned with a shiny red foil finish, adding a touch of magic and sparkle to your Christmas greetings.
High-Quality Construction: Crafted from premium card, these cards are designed to make your heartfelt messages shine during the festive season.
Eco-Friendly Packaging: Packaged in 100% recyclable materials, these cards allow you to send your greetings while being environmentally conscious.
Convenient Size: Each card measures approximately 12.5cm x 12.5cm and comes with matching envelopes (13cm x 13cm), making them perfect for mailing or gifting.
description: Delight the little ones this holiday season with our Pack of 10 Assorted Christmas Cards featuring charming designs of Santa and Rudolph! With a vibrant red foil finish, these cards bring festive cheer to your holiday greetings. Made from high-quality card, this set includes two adorable designs that are perfect for children. Each pack comes with ten matching white envelopes, making it easy to share your warm wishes with friends and family. Plus, with eco-friendly packaging that is 100% recyclable, you can celebrate the holidays while caring for the environment. Discover more festive treasures in the RSW Christmas collection!
